THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, THOMAS H. CRAWFORD, CAROLINE C. $5,274.77 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $829.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,764.73, COSTS OF SUIT PER COST BILL. CROSS-COMPLAINT IN FAVOR THE CROSS-DEFENDANT ARTHUR BRUNWASSER.
REPORTERS ESTIMATE RECEIVED
REPORTERS COSTS DEPOSITED BY APPELLANT

REMITTITUR FILED SUPERIOR COURT DETERMINES APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICIAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT MUNICIPAL COURT JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED. RESPONDENT'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PURSUANT TO CCP 1034 AND CRC 135 (A,B&C) COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO PREVAILING PARTY
